context: Tests whether the agent implements the core recently-viewed storage utility with the correct storage key, item cap, TTL constant, deduplication logic, IDs-only storage model, and silent error handling.

checklist.name: Storage key constant
checklist.description: The module defines a storage key constant with the value 'rv_products' used for localStorage access

checklist.name: Max items cap
checklist.description: The module defines a maximum items constant set to 12 (not a different number)

checklist.name: TTL constant value
checklist.description: The module defines a TTL constant equal to 30 days in milliseconds (30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)

checklist.name: IDs-only storage
checklist.description: The module stores only product IDs and timestamps — it does NOT store full product objects (no name, price, image, or URL fields in the stored data structure)

checklist.name: Deduplication before prepend
checklist.description: recordView filters out any existing entry for the product ID before prepending the new entry (preventing duplicates in the list)

checklist.name: Prepend newest first
checklist.description: recordView inserts the newly viewed product at position 0 (most recent first), not appended at the end

checklist.name: Slice to max items
checklist.description: recordView slices the updated array to MAX_ITEMS after prepending, so stored history never exceeds 12 entries

checklist.name: TTL filtering on read
checklist.description: getRecentlyViewedIds filters out entries whose viewedAt timestamp is older than the TTL (i.e., older than 30 days from now)

checklist.name: excludeId filtering
checklist.description: getRecentlyViewedIds accepts an excludeId parameter and omits that ID from the returned array

checklist.name: Silent failure on read
checklist.description: The storage read function wraps JSON.parse / localStorage.getItem in a try/catch and returns an empty array on error (does not throw)

checklist.name: Silent failure on write
checklist.description: The storage write function wraps localStorage.setItem in a try/catch and does not re-throw quota or access errors

checklist.name: clearHistory removes key
checklist.description: clearHistory calls localStorage.removeItem with the correct storage key to wipe history
